strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and tooling contributions at re:cinq, including MCP code generators
Founder of open-source GISCollective platform with Kubernetes deployment and real-world NGO adoption
concerns: No explicit evidence of AI/ML model development, training, or production-grade AI platforms built
Resume name (Aisha Okonkwo) mismatches all online handles and contact info (Szabo Bogdan), raising red flag
No mention of Master’s/PhD in AI or direct cloud AI product leadership as preferred qualification
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates 15+ years of full-stack engineering with recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq and open-source platform leadership, meeting the minimum experience requirement. However, the resume lists 'Aisha Okonkwo' while all contact details, websites, and GitHub profiles use 'Szabo Bogdan' — a critical identity mismatch that undermines credibility. Though they contributed to AI-agent tooling, there is no evidence of building or shipping AI-powered products or platforms as required. No advanced AI degree is listed, and cloud AI strategy leadership is implied but not demonstrated with owned outcomes.
